title: Leafstate
description: Changes leaves based on distance to a log.
body:
Leafstate adds 3 extra textures per leaf type with the trees in mind.

![Leaves in version 1.21.8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48ddc97a31ed2f85cc060e2926ea2591a067d261.png)

Some older Minecraft versions are also supported.

![Leaves in version 1.13](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c865e721b53221d9f9b8cbbfa2fa9c2a83a7dac4.png)

Leaves placed by hand are not affected. Leafstate version 1 has no mod support.

If you find any mod unsupported by this pack, be sure to let me know!

There will be no backports for versions below 1.13.

Dynamic Trees will not be supported due to it's different system.
